name: Summer Peach Tarts w/ Yonique® Peach Yogurt Sauce & Panela
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Defrost puff pastry according to box instructions.
3. Halve the peaches and remove the pit.
4. Once the pastry is defrosted, cut out a circle 1/4 inch larger than the peach.
5. Place one slice of Panela (1/4 inch thick) on the pastry circle and the peach half on top.
6. Sprinkle generously with powdered sugar.
7. Bake on a sheet pan for 12 - 15 minutes, until the puff pastry is cooked.
8. Let cool and serve with peach yogurt as sauce.
